```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The removal of the 80% Medicare cap on reimbursement rates for laboratories in California will allow California labs to avoid federally triggered cuts.",
    "California laboratories provide 75,826 jobs that are critical to the state, especially during the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "AB 265 aims to ensure equitable and sustainable payment rates in Medi-Cal for clinical diagnostic laboratory tests.",
    "Updating Medi-Cal’s payment policies for clinical laboratory testing will expand access to testing throughout California.",
    "Maintaining investment in Medi-Cal rates supports providers on the frontlines of the COVID-19 pandemic.",
    "The bill AB 265 is considered a critical step in the fight for health equity regarding health services like HIV and STI tests."
  ]
}
```
